name: Honey Buttermilk Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Press the button to mix and enjoy your bread.
NOTE: We use Saco buttermilk powder and adjust the water accordingly. For rolls, let the machine do the work through the MANUAL method (or DOUGH cycle). Then knead again by adding some flour if the dough is sticky. Shape into rolls and allow to rise until doubled in bulk. Bake at 375°F until lightly browned. Optionally, use an egg wash and sprinkle with sesame or caraway seeds before baking.
